dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*\nI'm so tired...
(I was planning on exposing their disguises today,\n but in the end,\n I was just thrown for another loop.)
(I feel like I could see through their disguises\n on the spot, but I just can't be completely sure...)
(I feel like I'm almost there, but...\n is something missing?)
(If I keep going like this,\n will I end up with the same results as yesterday?)
Ah! Uesugi-kun!
What's wrong?\nYou seem flustered.\nDid something happen?
Um, well, you see%p-2;――
Hey! If we stop here,\nthey'll find us again, you know?!
I'll explain the situation,\nso you two go ahead!
Y-yes, you're right.
Well then! Hurry!
Alright, see you later!
O-okay.
So? What's going on?
...Well. While we were taking a stroll\nin the park%p-2;――
Haah, haah...haahh...\nI can't do this anymore... I've hit my limit...
Just a little bit more! Hang in there!
Ooohh...
We'll be going on ahead, then!
...Okay, so?
Oh, yes.\nIt seems that a rumor had spread on social media\nthat Nakano Ichika has come to this park.
What?!\nIs it because of the commotion at the aquarium?!
Most likely.\nAs a result, fans who heard about it\nhave gathered in the park...
And, wherever we go, someone will call out to us.
So, you guys escaped here...
Yes. It's okay if it's just one or two people,\nbut it's really scary when there are so many.
...So, does that mean that the group \ncoming towards us are all after Ichika?
Eh?!
Let's run.
Absolutely, let's run!
(We quickly escaped from Ocean Expo Park,\n determined not to get caught up in the commotion.)
(Afterwards, we consulted with each other,\n we decided to head to another tourist spot\n before the situation escalated any further.)
